queries.question: What was the grade level of the youngest student?
queries.sql: SELECT Academics.GradeLevel FROM Academics JOIN  Enrollments ON Enrollments.CourseID = Academics.CourseID JOIN Students ON Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID ORDER BY DateOfBirth DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasAcademics ?academics .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?students p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: To what grade did Mr Brown teach?
queries.sql: SELECT GradeLevel FROM Academics WHERE Teacher LIKE '%Brown%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?academics p:Teacher ?teacher_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?teacher_lk), "^.*Brown.*$"))
}

queries.question: What discipline did Mr. Brown teach and to what grade?
queries.sql: SELECT Discipline, GradeLevel FROM Academics WHERE Teacher LIKE '%Brown%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?discipline ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?academics p:Discipline ?discipline .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?academics p:Teacher ?teacher_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?teacher_lk), "^.*Brown.*$"))
}

queries.question: What was the grade level of the youngest student and what discipline did they study?
queries.sql: SELECT Academics.Discipline, GradeLevel FROM Academics JOIN  Enrollments ON Enrollments.CourseID = Academics.CourseID JOIN Students ON Enrollments.StudentID = Students.StudentID ORDER BY DateOfBirth DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?discipline ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasAcademics ?academics .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?academics p:Discipline ?discipline .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?students p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: What did the youngest student study?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasAcademics ?academics .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?students p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?discipline ?gradelevel WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasAcademics ?academics .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?academics p:Discipline ?discipline .
  ?academics p:GradeLevel ?gradelevel .
  ?students p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?discipline WHERE {
  ?academics a :Academics .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasAcademics ?academics .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?academics p:Discipline ?discipline .
  ?students p:DateOfBirth ?dateofbirth_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?dateofbirth_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
